query:
INSERT INTO compliance_rules (createdBy, title, description, category, triggerKeywords, requiredPhrase, severity, weight, isActive, dealStage) VALUES
-- TILA (Truth in Lending Act) Rules
(1, 'Base Payment Disclosure Before Menu', 'TILA requires the base payment (without F&I products) to be disclosed to the customer before presenting the menu. This prevents payment packing.', 'federal_tila', '["menu","options","package","level","protection"]', 'Your base payment is', 'critical', 2.0, true, 'menu_presentation'),
(1, 'APR Disclosure Required', 'TILA mandates disclosure of the Annual Percentage Rate (APR) for all financed transactions. The APR must be stated clearly.', 'federal_tila', '["finance","rate","interest","apr","monthly payment"]', 'annual percentage rate', 'critical', 2.0, true, 'financial_snapshot'),
(1, 'Total of Payments Disclosure', 'TILA requires disclosure of the total amount the customer will pay over the life of the loan, including all interest.', 'federal_tila', '["finance","loan","term","months","payment"]', 'total of payments', 'warning', 1.5, true, 'financial_snapshot'),
(1, 'Finance Charge Disclosure', 'TILA requires the total finance charge (cost of credit) to be disclosed separately from the amount financed.', 'federal_tila', '["finance charge","cost of credit","interest charge"]', 'finance charge', 'warning', 1.5, true, 'financial_snapshot'),
-- ECOA (Equal Credit Opportunity Act) Rules
(1, 'Adverse Action Notice Awareness', 'ECOA requires that if credit is denied or offered on less favorable terms, the customer must be informed of their right to an explanation.', 'federal_ecoa', '["denied","declined","not approved","tier","rate bump","higher rate"]', 'right to know', 'critical', 2.0, true, 'financial_snapshot'),
(1, 'Risk-Based Pricing Disclosure', 'ECOA/FCRA requires disclosure when a customer receives less favorable credit terms based on information in their credit report.', 'federal_ecoa', '["credit score","tier","rate","based on your credit","risk"]', 'based on your credit', 'critical', 2.0, true, 'financial_snapshot'),
(1, 'No Discriminatory Language', 'ECOA prohibits discrimination based on race, color, religion, national origin, sex, marital status, or age in credit transactions.', 'federal_ecoa', '["because you are","due to your age","your nationality","your religion"]', null, 'critical', 2.5, true, null),
-- UDAP (Unfair, Deceptive, or Abusive Acts or Practices) Rules
(1, 'No Misleading Payment Quotes', 'UDAP prohibits quoting only the payment with products included without first disclosing the base payment. This is payment packing.', 'federal_udap', '["your payment would be","payment is","monthly payment","with everything"]', null, 'critical', 2.0, true, 'menu_presentation'),
(1, 'Product Optional Nature Disclosure', 'UDAP requires that all F&I products (GAP, VSC, PPM, etc.) be presented as optional and not required for financing.', 'federal_udap', '["gap","service contract","warranty","maintenance","protection","required"]', 'completely optional', 'critical', 2.0, true, 'menu_presentation'),
(1, 'No Deceptive Coverage Claims', 'UDAP prohibits making false or misleading statements about product coverage, terms, or benefits.', 'federal_udap', '["covers everything","full coverage","all repairs","guaranteed","always covered"]', null, 'warning', 1.5, true, null),
(1, 'Privacy Policy Disclosure Required', 'GLBA requires that customers be informed of the dealership privacy policy and their rights regarding information sharing.', 'federal_udap', '["privacy","information","share","third party","data"]', 'privacy policy', 'critical', 2.0, true, 'introduction'),
-- GAP Insurance Disclosures
(1, 'GAP Insurance Optional Disclosure', 'GAP insurance must be presented as optional. Many states require explicit disclosure that GAP is not required for financing.', 'fi_product_disclosure', '["gap","guaranteed asset protection","gap insurance"]', 'optional', 'critical', 2.0, true, 'menu_presentation'),
(1, 'GAP Coverage Explanation Required', 'When presenting GAP, the manager must explain what it covers: the difference between the vehicle value and the loan balance in a total loss.', 'fi_product_disclosure', '["gap","total loss","insurance","accident","theft"]', 'difference between', 'warning', 1.5, true, 'menu_presentation'),
(1, 'GAP Cancellation Rights Disclosure', 'Customers must be informed they can cancel GAP insurance and receive a pro-rated refund if they pay off the loan early or trade in.', 'fi_product_disclosure', '["gap","cancel","refund","payoff","trade"]', 'cancel', 'warning', 1.5, true, 'menu_presentation'),
-- VSC (Vehicle Service Contract) Disclosures
(1, 'VSC Not a Manufacturer Warranty', 'A Vehicle Service Contract is not a warranty and must not be described as one. It is a service agreement.', 'fi_product_disclosure', '["warranty","service contract","vsc","extended warranty","coverage"]', null, 'warning', 1.5, true, 'menu_presentation'),
(1, 'VSC Optional for Financing', 'A Vehicle Service Contract is optional and not required to obtain financing. This must be clearly communicated.', 'fi_product_disclosure', '["service contract","vsc","warranty","required","financing"]', 'optional', 'critical', 2.0, true, 'menu_presentation'),
(1, 'VSC Coverage Term and Mileage Disclosure', 'The term (years) and mileage limit of the VSC must be clearly stated so the customer understands the coverage period.', 'fi_product_disclosure', '["service contract","vsc","warranty","years","miles","coverage period"]', null, 'warning', 1.0, true, 'menu_presentation'),
-- Process Step Rules
(1, 'Professional Hello Required', 'The ASURA Professional Hello must be delivered at the start of every F&I interaction to establish credibility and set the agenda.', 'process_step', '["hello","welcome","my name","finance director","fi manager","paperwork"]', 'finance director', 'warning', 1.0, true, 'introduction'),
(1, 'Three Discovery Questions Required', 'The Financial Snapshot must include at least three discovery questions: how long they keep vehicles, miles driven, and how they protect investments.', 'process_step', '["how long","miles","protect","investment","keep the vehicle","drive per year"]', null, 'warning', 1.0, true, 'financial_snapshot'),
(1, 'Consent for Recording Required', 'If the session is being recorded, customer consent must be obtained and acknowledged before recording begins.', 'process_step', '["record","recording","monitor","training purposes","consent"]', 'consent', 'critical', 2.0, true, 'introduction');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3bA4W9LsJnP6zN1.d96f6be79bf3 --database MQskutAJ8qMCMFRFedd6Fn --execute
